title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 再生成しました。元記事は [note](https://note.com/nice_wren7963/n/n323e2d757a50) を確認し、既存の source-grounded lock を継承したうえで、新しい auto-delivery pipeline で `v5-auto` に出力しています。 主成果物: - [output.pptx](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/output.pptx) - [output.pdf](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/output.pdf) - [inspection-report.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/inspection-report.json) - [repair-log.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/repair-log.json) - [delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/delivery-gate.json) - [preview](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/preview) 確認結果は `PASS` です。`expected=9 / rendered=9 / pdf=9 / preview=9`、`attempts_used=1`、PDF には `NotoSansJP-*` 埋め込みを確認しました。 引き継いだ upstream artifact: - [brief.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/brief.json) - [research.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/research.json) - [script-lock.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/script-lock.md) - [deck-spec.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/deck-spec.json) - [asset-plan.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/asset-plan.json) - [routing-decision.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/routing-decision.json) - [workflow-decision.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v5-auto/delivery/workflow-decision.json) Lane evidence: - note本文確認 lane - source-lock 継承と staging lane - native render + inspection + font/QC lane 必要なら次にそのまま開きます。
